expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体各板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度]是整体尺寸，[板材厚度]是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚度]是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านบน, ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm nền (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang laki ng mga tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ang kapal ng materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကီဘိနက်အတွက်ဘုတ်အညွှန်းအရွယ်အစားတွက်ချက်ခြင်း။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်ထပ်သတ် အပေါ်ဘုတ်၊ အောက်ဘုတ်နှင့်ဘေးဘုတ်ပစ္စည်း အထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដង់ស៊ីតេដែលមានទំហំសម្រាប់ទូ [Width], [Height],[Depth] គឺជា ទំហំសរុប​, [BoardThick] គឺជាមុខងារធាតុសំរាប់វីស, ទាបនិងដោយនៅលើបន្ទះវីស, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាគុណភាពក្រណាត់ផ្ទាំងខាងមុខ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຄອບສໍາລັບການສ້າງຕູ້ຜ້າ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ແມ່ນຂະຫນາດທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາວັດຖຸສໍາລັບດ້າໃສ່, ທ້າຍແລະດ້ານຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ຄືຄວາມຫນາຂອງBackground. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネット用のボードサイズを計算します。[Width], [Height], [Depth]は全体の寸法、[BoardThick] は上部、底部、側面ボードの材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背景ボードの材料の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛용 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 크기이고, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재질 두께이며, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재질 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un armario. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero posterior. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les tailles des planches pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] représentent les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau pour le dessus, le bas et les côtés, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de l'arrière-plan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Brettgrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height],[Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Dicke des Materials für Ober-, Unter-, und Seitenbretter, [BackBoardThick] ist die Dicke des Materials für die Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: किसी कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड का आकार गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height],[Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковой досок, [BackBoardThick] - толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
